title: Growth Marketing Specialist
responsibilities: launch and optimize multichannel campaigns; analyze funnel metrics and campaign performance; coordinate content, design, and sales stakeholders
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in digital marketing, content strategy, seo, google analytics, campaign management. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: NovaSoft is hiring a middle growth marketing specialist to support planning and executing acquisition, retention, and content campaigns.
raw_text: Vacancy V061: Growth Marketing Specialist at NovaSoft. Location: Warsaw. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 2.0 years. Required skills: digital marketing, content strategy, seo, google analytics, campaign management, smm, copywriting, hubspot, meta ads. Optional skills: landing pages, a/b testing. Responsibilities: launch and optimize multichannel campaigns; analyze funnel metrics and campaign performance; coordinate content, design, and sales stakeholders.
